headline: GE Aerospace Talks With Pentagon Put Defense Role In New Focus
summary: GE Aerospace is involved in preliminary discussions with US defense officials about using its manufacturing capacity to support higher weapons and military supply production. The talks come as global defense spending reaches unprecedented levels and European countries increase budgets, with all NATO members now meeting spending commitments. The discussions highlight GE's potential role in helping address urgent US defense supply needs and could influence future contract opportunities for its...
